rules_created.name: holdtest-rule-hvs
rules_created.note: CONTAMINATED test: measurementScope=all sums costs TENANT-WIDE, not agent-scoped. Denied due to pre-existing tenant spend (~$0.2776), not informative for hold-vs-settlement. Paused immediately after discovery.

rules_created.name: holdtest-rule-hvs-2
rules_created.note: PRIMARY TEST rule. Correctly agent-isolated. This is the rule that answered the hold-vs-settlement question.

rules_created.name: holdtest-rule-hvs-toctou
rules_created.note: TOCTOU test rule: limit set to allow exactly 1 call's hold (~$0.0024) but not 2 (~$0.0048).

baseline_call_no_rule_active.prompt: In exactly one sentence, define "settlement" in payments.

agent.label: Hold vs Settlement Test Agent
agent.name: holdtest-agent-hvs
agent.description: Dedicated throwaway agent for the hold-vs-settlement governance experiment. Never used for real production calls. Safe test residue.

message.content: A settlement in payments refers to the process of completing a financial transaction by transferring funds between parties, ensuring that the payer's account is debited and the payee's account is credited.

accounts.note: totalBalance unchanged from pre-baseline-settlement value ($4.722428) throughout the whole experiment -- confirms no capture beyond the $0.0001 baseline settlement. unavailableBalance ($0.009612 = 4 x $0.002403 holds from the denied gated + 3 TOCTOU calls) had not yet auto-released as of report time, ~9.5 min after the oldest of the 4 holds was placed -- confirmed via a live cross-check of /v1/transactions across ALL agents that no other concurrent process contributed to this balance (only holdtest-agent-hvs's 4 denied transactions have non-superseded/active cost rows in this window).
